mitigations.mitigation_name: Disable or restrict local archive and staging utilities on the Ubuntu host to prevent collection and packaging of sensitive files

args.command: chmod 000 /usr/bin/tar /bin/tar 2>/dev/null; chmod 000 /usr/bin/find /bin/find 2>/dev/null; printf 'tar:	'; ls -l /usr/bin/tar 2>/dev/null || ls -l /bin/tar 2>/dev/null; printf 'find:	'; ls -l /usr/bin/find 2>/dev/null || ls -l /bin/find 2>/dev/null
